name: Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate inventory valuation reports instead of using manual spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate financial reporting due to manual inventory tracking.
features: Manual data entry for inventory counts

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual spreadsheets for inventory and valuation.
must_have_features: Manual data entry for inventory counts

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate inventory valuation reports instead of using manual spreadsheets.
